description: The Kodo-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based in Nagoya, Japan, founded in 1984 by Shinobu Tsukasa. It is a secondary organization of the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi, the largest yakuza syndicate in Japan, with an estimated membership of 4,000. The Kodo-kai is known for its defiant attitude toward police and its involvement in banking, real estate, securities, and show business. It is considered by the National Police Agency to be more like a mafia-type or terrorist organization.
